name: Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, difficulty in matching receipts causes cash flow gaps. We automate the matching process instead of manual reconciliation of receipts and statements.
problem_solved: Difficulty in matching expense receipts with credit card statements
